assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends Extended release channel with detailed explanation of why it provides maximum control and up to 24 months of support per version

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud command to add 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' exclusion and clearly explains it blocks minor version and node upgrades while allowing control plane security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Includes maintenance window configuration in cluster creation command with Saturday weekly recurrence and 4-hour duration window

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Creates separate 'h100-training-pool' node pool with training-specific taints and labels, isolated from the base cluster nodes

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Shows manual upgrade workflow for training campaigns and explains using maintenance exclusions to prevent automatic upgrades during training periods

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Includes training job YAML with checkpointing environment variables (CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL, CHECKPOINT_PATH) and extended terminationGracePeriodSeconds for checkpoint saving

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Includes detailed staging cluster setup and validation workflow that specifically mentions validating GPU driver compatibility and CUDA versions before production upgrades

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPUDirect or RDMA networking requirements or their version compatibility considerations
